name: Deploy Readiness Check
description: Verify project is ready for deployment: tests, build, git status

input.command: git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo '---'; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null

if [ -f package.json ]; then npm test 2>&1 | tail -20; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python3 -m pytest --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20; elif [ -f Makefile ]; then make test 2>&1 | tail -20; else echo 'No test runner detected'; fi

if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10; elif [ -f Makefile ]; then make build 2>&1 | tail -10; elif [ -f Dockerfile ]; then echo 'Dockerfile found — docker build required'; else echo 'No build step detected'; fi
